message:
fix(core): refactor fleet memory hysteresis to sliding-window model and fix builtin pack normalization

Replace raw_tier/consecutive_raw counters with VecDeque-based sliding window
hysteresis in FleetScrollbackOrchestrator. Allows threshold-based sustained
pressure detection with separate escalation vs de-escalation decision logic,
preventing noise in tier readings from causing false transitions.

Fix normalize_pack_key() to properly handle keys without "builtin:" prefix
by inverting the condition check. Fixes bug where already-prefixed keys would
fail lookup in packs array.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
